name: jvm
description: JVM development assistant with shared skills for tooling workflows, runtime diagnostics, and garbage-collection guidance.
author: ririnto

interface.shortDescription: Shared JVM tooling, runtime diagnostics, and GC workflows.
interface.longDescription: Install a shared skill-first plugin for standard JDK tools, JVM runtime evidence, and garbage-collection analysis across Claude Code and Codex-style runtimes.
defaultPrompt: Which JVM tool should I use for this packaging or module problem?
Interpret this thread dump, JFR, or heap-pressure symptom.
Explain this GC symptom and what evidence to collect next.
